title: MPC failure diagnostics and surrogate correction plan
purpose: Diagnose why v0.15.2 offline MPC closed-loop comparison failed and define a correction plan before another MPC comparison run.
non_goals: Do not run a new MPC performance experiment.
Do not claim that MPC is unsuitable in general.
Do not modify the fixed v0.14.3 P-only baseline.
diagnostic_questions: Was the v0.15.2 failure a technical execution failure or a scientific negative result?
Is the MPC surrogate comparable with the baseline PID simulation?
Do MPC skeleton parameters materially affect the simulated results?
Is action delay handled consistently with the simulator specification?
Are transient and settled metrics reliable for high-frequency target profiles?
What should be corrected before v0.15.4?
